modification.description: Adds environment banner to admin panel header
modification.replace:
🚧 LOCAL DEVELOPMENT - NON-PRODUCTION 🚧 🧪 STAGING - NON-PRODUCTION 🧪 ⚠️ UNKNOWN NON-PRODUCTION ENVIRONMENT - {$environment|escape} ⚠️
$0

modification.description: Adds CSS for environment banner in admin panel
Adds link to user's history logs under on the about page of their profile
modification.replace:
$0
History Logs
History Logs

modification.description: Adds link to user's history logs under their username on a forum post
